title: Conditional skip in queries_test.go when data directory is absent
evidence: internal/soccer/queries_test.go:39 — t.Skipf("no data available at %s", ...) in store() helper; guards all 9 query tests
suggestion: Acceptable guard for missing test fixtures; ensure data/kaggle/ is present in CI to avoid silent skips

title: Conditional skip in server_test.go when data directory is absent
evidence: internal/mcpserver/server_test.go:29 — t.Skip("no data available") in testServer() helper; guards 6 MCP tests
suggestion: Same data-presence guard as queries_test.go; both activate only when CSV fixtures are missing
